name: FieldView Platform API
description:
All endpoints are only accessible via https and are located at
`api.platform.com`.
## Limits
If the request threshold for a partner is exceeded, a `429` response code will be returned.  Additionally, the following header will be returned: `Retry-After` (https://www.w3.org/Protocols/rfc2616/rfc2616-sec14.html).
## Pagination
Pagination is performed via headers.  Any request which returns a list may be paginated.  If the results are paginated, a header will be returned: `x-next-token`
## Response Headers
The following response headers will be returned on every call, successful or not: `x-http-request-id`.  If you every experience an issue with our api, and need to contact technical support, please supply the value of the `x-http-request-id` header along with an approximate time of when the request was made.
